calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Baron J. Drexel, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Charles F. Bourdon, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Xiao Shan Feng.
Default was entered against defendant on May 15, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, February 19, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Charles F. Bourdon, and against the Defaulted Defendant Xiao Shan Feng as follows:

Damages/Principal - N/A.
Prejudgment Interest - N/A.
Attorney's Fees - N/A.
Costs - $450, for a total judgment in the amount of $450.00.

The Court Orders further that plaintiff Charles F. Bourdon's contract for attorney's fees was valid, and no monies are due and owing to defendant Xiao Shan Feng.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
